column2: Verify Trial Supervisor Creates Complete and Proper Range Safety/Trials Documentation Set
column3: ['Check if the trial supervisor is responsible for creating a range safety/trials documentation set. ', 'Verify that test plans, flight test cards, post-flight reports, and trial reports have been created by the trial supervisor. ', 'Assess if the produced documentation addresses both safe execution of flight trials and ability to achieve trial objectives. ']
column4: ['The trial supervisor should be identified as being responsible. ', 'All required documents are present. ', 'The documentation should address both aspects appropriately. ']
